TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Abyssal Legions Faction.

Translations.Comment: Legionen = legions. Organized demonic armies, mixed with corrupted mortals.
Nordmänner = Northmen (barbarians). Axtkrieger = axe warriors. Corrupted northern warriors.
Armored warriors corrupted by the abyss.
Corrupted knights serving the abyss. Heavy demonic cavalry.
War hounds from the abyss. Fast attack beasts.
Greater demon. Same as in Abyssal Demons faction.
Lesser demons. Same as in Abyssal Demons faction.
Corrupted war mammoth. Massive beast of war.
Dragon corrupted by the abyss. Terrifying flying monster.
Standard German term for manticore. Mythological beast.
Elite warrior of the abyss. Mighty hero unit.
